GUIDE_1: Follow the hand to shoot the first square.
GUIDE_2: Shoot a square of the same value to merge them into make a double value.
GUIDE_3: Merge three same squares to get new square of triple value.
GUIDE_4: Let's prepare for the bigger mergging.
GUIDE_5: You can click here to swap the bullets.
GUIDE_6: Let's merge them and get the combo.
HAMMER_TEXT: Use hammer to remove one block
RECUE_TEXT: Use rescue to clear 3 top rows.
BIG_NUMBER_TEXT: You have made a big number!
AD_BREAK_TEXT: Watch a short ad and get the reward.
Rewarded Failed: Failed to get the rewarded! Please try again
